nasb.text: “Why do Your disciples break the tradition of the elders? For they do not wash their hands when they eat bread.”

esv.text: “Why do your disciples break the tradition of the elders? For they do not wash their hands when they eat.”

cnv.text: “你的門徒為甚麼違背古人的傳統，在飯前不洗手呢？”

ccb.text: “为什么你的门徒吃饭前不行洗手礼，破坏祖先的传统呢？”

csbs.text: “你的门徒们为什么违犯古人的传统呢？他们吃饭的时候不洗手！”
